questions.q: Which international defense board did the U.S. Pentagon announce it was pausing its participation in with Canada on May 19, 2026?
options: Canada-U.S. Permanent Joint Board on Defence
questions.correctText: Canada-U.S. Permanent Joint Board on Defence

questions.q: According to a May 2026 PsyPost report, White Americans who feel they are on the losing side of politics are more likely to oppose economic redistribution programs only under what specific condition?
options: They compare their political standing directly to racial minorities
They are actively experiencing a decline in personal income
They live in predominantly low-income neighborhoods
They are prompted with statistics about federal tax rates
questions.correctText: They compare their political standing directly to racial minorities

questions.q: In May 2026, the CDC confirmed that an American doctor contracted which deadly virus while working in the Democratic Republic of the Congo?

A May 2026 psychological study found that while both political sides are reluctant to promote rhetoric from the opposing side, which group was more consistently hesitant to support their own causes when framed with opposing moral language?
In May 2026, China announced the full operation of a 24-megawatt underwater data center that uses ocean water for passive cooling and is uniquely powered by what source?
As reported on May 19, 2026, students from which Ontario region traveled to a remote Inuit community in Northern Quebec for a cultural exchange program?
Why did a federal jury in California rule against Elon Musk in his 2026 lawsuit against OpenAI?
options: He waited too long to file the case
He lacked standing as a former board member
OpenAI proved they remained a non-profit
questions.correctText: He waited too long to file the case

questions.q: Driven by surging power demand for AI data centers, NextEra Energy announced a $66.8 billion all-stock deal in May 2026 to acquire which regulated utility?
A New York judge ruled that which two items found in Luigi Mangione's backpack can be used as evidence in his upcoming trial for the murder of a UnitedHealthcare CEO?
options: A cellphone and a weapon magazine
A flash drive and a mask

questions.q: Which province announced on May 19, 2026, that it aims to bolster rural paramedic numbers by adding 32 new training seats at Assiniboine College?
